---
title: 'EVERYTHING!'
date: '2010-11-29T04:58:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4555025743688957296'
blogger_filename: '/2010/11/everything.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

What did Pastor Preach about today? EVERYTHING! Everything is going to be ALL Right in the household of FAITH!
